title: Prevent duplicate slug intents from bypassing gate protections in the same bridge loop iteration
evidence: Trade #236 (conf=0.56) opened after first intent was correctly rejected. Second intent for same slug in same loop was not blocked because no per-iteration rejected-slug set existed.
approach: Add _loop_rejected_slugs: set[str] = set() before the bridge loop; check and update it around check_entry_gates() call
